verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use source_snapshot when current public sources agree on active or expired state. Prefer official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence when accessible; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing official Discord.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Official page is by Shadowrise Devs and currently titled [2x Luck] Sailor Piece. The description tells players to join the community server for news, updates, and exclusive reward codes, and lists max level 20000. It does not expose current code strings.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: Public web access only returned the Discord JavaScript app shell, so channel messages and code-list/game-announcements posts were not accessible. Discord was not used as direct code evidence today.

sources.name: Official Trello board
sources.notes: Public web access returned a Trello resource/JavaScript loading failure. Previous checks found the public codes card lagging behind current code waves, so Trello was not used as direct proof today.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 25, 2026. Lists 10 active codes: 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM, FREECODEFORYALLL2, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It now lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG and older predecessor codes as inactive. It says new codes are posted in the official Discord game-announcements channel.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 25, 2026 and says it added new Sailor Piece codes on May 25. Lists the two new codes 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM and FREECODEFORYALLL2 plus all 9 previously retained Ghoul Update active codes. It provides exact reward bundles for the two new codes and most retained codes. It still lists older predecessor codes as active, creating a stale-listing conflict. It says codes arrive in the official Discord code-list channel.

sources.name: Destructoid Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Published/updated May 25, 2026. Lists 11 active codes: the two new codes, all three restart-bug variants, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and RAIDS. It lists older predecessor codes such as 700KFAVSTY, HUGEUPDATEWWW, DELAYCODENR1/2, 1B100MVISITS, 1B200MVISITS, and 1B300MVISITS as expired.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Last updated May 20, 2026. Lists 8 active codes from the prior Ghoul Update set and publishes level requirements: 12,500 for the newest restart/content codes and 7,500 for GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG and older predecessor codes as expired and has not yet reflected the May 25 two-code addition.

sources.name: PCGamesN Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 23, 2026. Lists 8 latest codes from the prior Ghoul wave, including SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG but omitting RAIDS and the two May 25 codes. It lists several older predecessor codes as expired.

sources.name: Pocket Gamer Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 24, 2026. Lists the prior Ghoul Update set but omits SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG and the two May 25 codes, while still listing several older predecessor codes as active. Treated as lagging/stale for today's new codes.

sources.name: SuperCheats Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Opened page says last updated/checked May 22, 2026 and lists the prior 9-code Ghoul Update set with RAIDS and SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG active. Search snippets suggested a May 25 update, but the accessible page content did not show the two new codes, so it was not used as May 25 evidence.

decisions.reason: Added because Pro Game Guides, Beebom, and Destructoid all updated May 25 and list it active/new. Beebom provides the exact reward bundle. No source checked today published a numeric level gate.
Added because Pro Game Guides, Beebom, and Destructoid all updated May 25 and list it active/new. Beebom provides the exact reward bundle. No source checked today published a numeric level gate.

Listed active/current by Pro Game Guides, Beebom, and Destructoid today; also supported by recent GamesRadar, PCGamesN, Pocket Gamer, and SuperCheats checks. Level gate remains 12,500 based on prior GamesRadar context.

Listed active/current by Pro Game Guides, Beebom, and Destructoid today; also supported by recent GamesRadar, PCGamesN, Pocket Gamer, and SuperCheats checks. Level gate remains 12,500 based on prior GamesRadar context.

Destructoid and Beebom list it active/current today, while Pro Game Guides lists it inactive and GamesRadar previously listed it expired. Kept active because expiry evidence remains split and no official expiry proof was accessible.
Listed active/current by Pro Game Guides, Beebom, and Destructoid today; reward bundle and level 12,500 gate remain supported by current/recent sources.
Listed active/current by Pro Game Guides, Beebom, and Destructoid today; reward bundle and level 12,500 gate remain supported by current/recent sources.
Listed active/current by Pro Game Guides, Beebom, and Destructoid today; reward bundle and level 12,500 gate remain supported by current/recent sources.
Listed active/current by Pro Game Guides, Beebom, and Destructoid today. Beebom supports the stored exact reward bundle and prior GamesRadar evidence supports level 7,500.

Listed active/current by Pro Game Guides, Beebom, and Destructoid today. Beebom and PCGamesN support the stored reward bundle; Dexerto previously listed a conflicting raid-key bundle. Level 7,500 remains supported by prior GamesRadar evidence.

Listed active/current by Pro Game Guides, Beebom, and Destructoid today. PCGamesN omits it but does not give direct expiry evidence. Reward bundle and level 7,500 gate remain supported by current/recent sources.
No active code had strong enough new expiry evidence to move today. SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG remains split rather than conclusively expired.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pro Game Guides lists it inactive and GamesRadar previously lists it expired. Destructoid updated May 25 and lists it active; Beebom also lists it active, and recent PCGamesN/SuperCheats checks supported it active.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official Discord/Trello confirms expiry or another strong current source joins the explicit expired evidence.

source_conflicts.conflict: 700KFAVSTY, FREECODEHERE1, HUGEUPDATEWWW, DELAYCODENR1, DELAYCODENR2, 1B100MVISITS, 1B200MVISITS, 1B300MVISITS, 1M100KLIKESTYYY, and TYSMFOR400KFOLLOWONEVENT remain split. Pro Game Guides, Destructoid, GamesRadar, PCGamesN, and SuperCheats treat many as inactive/expired or omit them; Beebom and Pocket Gamer still list some/all as active.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not restore unless official evidence appears or active-source agreement becomes stronger than the stale-listing pattern.

source_conflicts.conflict: No checked source gave numeric minimum levels for 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM or FREECODEFORYALLL2. Current sources only label them active/new or give reward bundles.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep min_level null until a source publishes numeric requirements or an in-game redemption test is performed.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom and PCGamesN support the stored no-raid-key bundle, while Dexerto previously listed a raid-key bundle. Current May 25 Pro Game Guides and Destructoid only say free rewards.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep the stored exact bundle until official evidence or stronger exact-source agreement confirms a different reward.
